steps.title: Identify the maximum and minimum values
steps.content: In the list 16, 5, 22, 16, 20, 8, the maximum value is 22 and the minimum value is 5.

steps.title: Calculate the range
steps.content: Subtract the minimum from the maximum: $$22 - 5 = 17$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $17$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $17$.
